title: Research data for publication DOI: 10.1002/admt.202401404
author: Martin Bartošík
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Data from this project are mostly in excel files in a table format. These data comprise e.g.
- pseudonymized medical data from patient samples (age, sex, type of tumor, BRAF mutation status as determined by NGS, tumor tissue % in biopsy, grade, TNM, therapy, etc.)
- digital PCR data 
- data for calculating receiver operating characteristic (ROC) curves
- images showing gel electrophoresis of various samples under various experimental conditions
- optical density tables
- statistical data and tests (to show method accuracy, specificity, sensitivity etc.)
- electrochemical data in a form of electric current values for each sample (replicate values) in various experimental setups (optimization studies, calibration plots, real sample analysis etc.) and their graphical visualization
